name: Labrynth Set-Up
name_jp: ラビュリンス・セッティング
desc: Target 2 of your "Labrynth" Spells/Traps that are banished or in your GY, except "Labrynth Set-Up"; shuffle them into the Deck, then if you control a Fiend monster, you can Set non-"Labrynth" Normal Traps with different names directly from your Deck equal to the number shuffled. You can only activate 1 "Labrynth Set-Up" per turn.
eff: Target 2 of your "Labrynth" Spells/Traps that are banished or in your GY, except "Labrynth Set-Up"; shuffle them into the Deck, then if you control a Fiend monster, you can Set non-"Labrynth" Normal Traps with different names directly from your Deck equal to the number shuffled. You can only activate 1 "Labrynth Set-Up" per turn.

sets.set: 25th Anniversary Tin: Dueling Heroes Mega Pack

action: Returns from your Graveyard to your Deck
Returns the player's banished cards to the Deck
